title: Pleurostemon albus
taxonomy: Pleurostemon albus is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Aizoaceae. The family Aizoaceae is a group of succulent plants commonly known as the vygies. The genus Pleurostemon is further divided into a few species, all of which are endemic to South Africa. The classification of Pleurostemon albus is as a succulent plant, characterized by its fleshy leaves and stems. It is an annual or perennial herb native to the Western Cape province of South Africa.
